title: Smoky Creamy Saudia Snow Peas Stir-fry
description: This quick-fix smoky and creamy saudi arabian dish features snow peas in a dairy-free sauce that is both satisfying and comforting.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup nutritional yeast
ingredients.notes: for added richness and umami flavor

ingredients.name: 1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: to add smokiness to the dish

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon cumin
ingredients.notes: enhances the flavors of the dish without overpowering it

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup cashew milk or almond milk
ingredients.notes: use dairy-free for a true dairy-free option

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon lemon juice
ingredients.notes: adds freshness and brightness to the sauce

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add the snow peas, garlic, and onion to the pan. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes or until the vegetables start to soften.
Stir in the nutritional yeast, smoked paprika, cumin, lemon juice, and salt. Mix well.
Pour in the cashew milk or almond milk and stir continuously until the sauce thickens slightly, approximately 1 minute.
Remove from heat and serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
